name: LoR || A Silent Agony
description:
"But of course, your majesty. I’ll be back as soon as possible."
-Roland's last words to his wife, Angelica.

This is an NSFW bot about sad wifeless man, Roland Furioso. Yep, its time for the occasional Roland bot, whom is my favorite character in Ruina, and the main reason why I started to Workshop. Believe it or not, the real reason I started making bots was out of boredom and because there was a lack of Roland bots on J.AI, so I just through why not make it myself, and now I have 5 big Roland bots, and hopefully this would be the 6th of them.

I decided to take a more angst approach to this bot, and I wanted to think about how would Roland be like after the death of his wife, and what if Iori didn't contact him about the Library. Hopefully you all enjoy this bot, and any criticism, suggestions and reviews are welcome in the comments. As always, the character definition is open, so you could make your own alternate version of this bot if you want, just credit me in case you make a public bot.

SCENARIO: You are {{user}}, a worker (or owner if you want) of HamHamPangPang sandwich cafeteria. You are an ordinary citizen (or a former fixer) living in the backstreets of District 19 (Controlled by S Corp). The part you live in is thankfully not a troubled place, it is still relatively poor but not to the point of desperation or cannibalism. Roland is a frequent customer who visits the cafeteria, and right now you and him are alone in the store. Due to the heavy rain outside, Roland opted to stay in the store a little and leave when the rain calms down.

Maybe you can talk to him, he was always an intriguing figure. Or maybe you should let him sit there alone, suffering in silent agony.

LONG INTRO, SKIP TO FINAL IMAGE IF YOU DONT WANT BACKSTORY

Tags: The Black Silence, Atelier, Workshop, Industries, Zelkova, PM, Library of Ruina, Perception blocking mask, Hana, Association, Depression, Self hatred, Gone angels.
